name: Tuna Club and Peppers
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 slices brioche or egg bread or good quality multi-grain bread
1/2 cup julienned roasted red or yellow bell peppers (fresh or from jar)
2 cups washed and dried fresh arugula leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it becomes crisp.
2. Combine mayonnaise with lemon juice, garlic, turmeric, ground cumin, and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Pan grill the bread just until dried out or toasted; pan grill the tuna only 3 minutes on each side, or until rare.
4. Remove bacon to paper towels to drain.
5. To assemble, spread mayonnaise on one side of each slice of bread.
6. Slice the tuna into thin diagonal pieces.
7. Place some arugula at the bottom of each bread slice, then top with bacon, peppers, and tuna, covering with another piece of bread with mayonnaise side down.
8. Repeat for the other sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
